nodes.label_negative: AI as threat to job security

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as a helpful tool
Concern about privacy with AI
nodes.grounding_span: My largest frustration with AI right now is juggling understanding of privacy concerns

nodes.label: Optimism about AI as future tool
nodes.grounding_span: it can lead to more productivity and reduced worker stress

nodes.label: Preference for keeping graphic design personal
nodes.grounding_span: I still make my own graphics, even though there are AI tools out there for it

nodes.label: Iterative threshold-based task delegation — switches to manual after 3-4 corrections
nodes.grounding_span: If I have had to make 3 or 4 corrections, I will just take what it gave me and finish it myself

nodes.label: Privacy-conscious abstraction — uses generic placeholders to protect data
nodes.grounding_span: ask the AI models these things with generic naming and such so I can make the specific changes for myself
